title: Command E-Chest
description: Allows you to acces your e-chest with a command!
body:
# **Command E-Chest**

Use commands to acces your E-chest and customize who is allowed to use it and if everyone is allowed to use it (you can also add a whitelist for who is allowed to use it)

## E-chest Commands:
- /echest

## Config.yml Structure And Limitations:
   Limitations:
-    You cant have allowAll and whitelistEnabled
   Structure:
- whitelistEnabled: false < Only players in the white list below can use the commands
- AllowAll: true < All players Are Allowed to use the commands
- whitelist: < the white list for commands
- Player1 < example player
- Player2 < example player


##   Links:
